message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series.expanding().corr/cov(other) parity (frankenpandas-xarz)

Adds Expanding::corr and Expanding::cov matching
pd.Series.expanding().corr(other) / cov(other). At each position the
statistic is computed over all prior (and current) aligned pairs where
both values are non-null and numeric. Returns NaN until min_periods
and at least two valid pairs are observed; corr also returns NaN when
either sample standard deviation is zero. Mirrors the semantics of the
existing Rolling::corr/cov helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
